content.text:
Based on my visual inspection of the zoomed-in view of atom N:16, I can identify its neighbour atoms by observing the covalent bonds connected to it.

## Results

**Atom N:16 is covalently connected to the following neighbour atoms:**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|-------------|---------|
| 7 | C |
| 17 | C |
| 5 | O |

**geomconf_index:** 7726

The nitrogen atom (N:16) has three neighbours: two carbon atoms (C:7 and C:17) and one oxygen atom (O:5).

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 16, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
